creator: admin@lissyara.su
text:
I have 12 x 750G disks in 1 storage.
When I create array < 2T - I may see and work with them correct.
When I create > 2T:
(da2:ciss1:0:1:0): got CAM status 0x4
(da2:ciss1:0:1:0): fatal error, failed to attach to device
(da2:ciss1:0:1:0): lost device
(da2:ciss1:0:1:0): removing device entry
============
I probe setup linux on this machine - centos4.5 see and format disk with
size 8T...

full dmesg
==========
